channel.title: The Long Game on Betzalel's Writings
channel.description: Recent content in The Long Game on Betzalel's Writings

item.title: Chapter 1: The Opening
item.description: The city never sleeps, and neither did the plan. Every choice was a move toward an end no one could see yet.

item.title: Chapter 2: The Board
item.description: The plan was clearer now: move through the shadows, avoid the obvious, and trust only the structure.
